Bella
Bella by circuslollipop
Allegiance Peach
Culture Rivermen

Stoney Sept[2]

Mother A whore from Stoney Sept
Books
  • A Storm of Swords (appears)
  • A Feast for Crows (appendix)

Bella is a young prostitute at the Peach in Stoney Sept. She is a bastard daughter of King Robert I Baratheon.[2]

Contents

  • 1 Appearance
  • 2 History
  • 3 Recent Events
    • 3.1 A Storm of Swords
  • 4 Quotes
  • 5 Family
  • 6 References

Appearance[ ]

Bella has curly hair black as coal, like Robert's.[3] According to a semi-canon source she has blue eyes,[2] also like the king's.[4]

History[ ]

According to Leslyn, Bella's mother was the favorite prostitute of Lord Robert Baratheon at the Peach when he hid in Stoney Sept during Robert's Rebellion. Bella is named after the Battle of the Bells,[3] which occurred when Lord Jon Connington attacked the town in search of the future king.[5]

Recent Events[ ]

A Storm of Swords[ ]

Arya Stark and Gendry meet Bella when they pass through Stoney Sept with the brotherhood without banners and stay at the Peach. Ignorant that Gendry is also a bastard of the late King Robert, Bella flirts with him, but he declines her advances. She then flirts instead with Jack-Be-Lucky.[3]

Quotes[ ]

I'm named Bella. For the battle. I bet I could ring your bell, too. You want to?[3]

—Bella to Gendry
